title: Profiling, Allocator Performance, and Hardening · Failure Case: Optimization Preserves Contract
summary: A low-latency gateway reduces allocations but increases peak memory, fragmentation, and tail pauses under changed traffic. Planned artifact: Add and verify the cmem optimization preserves contract increment in measured allocator optimization report. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Require functional, sanitizer, resource, load, and changed-workload evidence before accepting a memory optimization.
Evaluate allocator checks, guard pages, canaries, randomization, control-flow defenses, fortification, and production cost.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.
